name: Frozen Soy Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups vanilla or carob soy milk
Heaping tablespoon Wax Orchards peanut-butter fudge sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy milk, date sugar, and Wax Orchards peanut-butter fudge sauce in a blender.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
Note on Wax Orchards fudge sauce: This product is low in fat for the peanut butter fudge variant, with virtually no fat for the fudge variant. It is sweetened with fruit juices. You can find it in health food stores, gourmet stores, or by mail order from Wax Orchards (800) 634-6132. They also offer other fruit-juice sweetened sauces.
This recipe will be as low-fat as the soy milk you choose to use. Using a higher-fat soy milk will result in a creamier product. My husband has successfully used WestSoy Lite, which contains 2 grams of fat per cup.
